locations.name: 湿地
locations.summary: 濕地（wetland）是永久或季節性被较浅的水（少于6米的淡水、半咸水或海水）掩蓋的獨特自然环境，是一種許多缺氧過程具有優勢的半水生生態系統，也是陸地生態系統和水域生態系統之間的過渡性地帶。有許多水生植物生長在土壤长期被水体浸泡的特定濕地…

locations.name: 苏丹
locations.summary: 蘇丹共和國（阿拉伯語：جمهورية السودان；Republic of the Sudan），通稱蘇丹（阿拉伯語：السودان，羅馬化：Sūdān，/suːˈdɑːn/或/suːˈdæn/），南蘇丹獨立後亦被稱為北蘇丹，是位於東北…

locations.name: 衣索比亞高原
locations.summary: 衣索比亞高原（又譯埃塞俄比亞高地）是非洲國家埃塞俄比亞、厄立特里亞和索馬里的一個高原，由一群堅固且大規模的山構成，在非洲之角的索馬里北部及衣索比亞。它有時也被稱為“非洲屋脊”（Roof of Africa），因為它的高度和很大的面積。 衣…

locations.name: 東非大裂谷湖泊
locations.summary: 東非大裂谷湖泊是沿著東非大裂谷在非洲東部從北方埃塞俄比亚到南方马拉维的一系列湖泊，這些湖泊包括全球最古老、最大型和最深的湖泊。许多湖泊是有丰富生物多樣性的淡水生态区，而其他的鹽鹼湖則存有高度特殊的生物体。 东非大裂谷的湖泊是以在其中的水域…

relations.subject: 黑冕鶴
relations.evidence: It is usually found in the shallow wetlands of sub-Saharan Africa during the wet season, which act as its principal breeding, feeding and roosting sites although it can also be found foraging in grasslands and near croplands of dry savanna

relations.subject: 黑冕鶴
relations.evidence: The black crowned crane is found across the Sahel and Sudan savanna regions of Africa, occupying open areas such as grasslands, shallow wetlands, marshes, as well as the margins of lakes and rivers.{{Cite journal|last1=Aticho |first1=Abebayehu |last2=Gemeda |first2=Dessalegn Obsi |last3=Feyssa |first3=Debela Hunde |last4=Jiru |first4=Dereje Bekele |last5=Beyene |first5=Abebe |last6=Seyoum |first6=Dinberu |last7=Snelder |first7=Denyse J

relations.subject: 黑冕鶴
relations.evidence: |last8=Feyisa |first8=Gudina Legese |last9=Aynalem |first9=Shimelis |last10=Archibald |first10=George |last11=Gutema |first11=Tariku Mekonnen |year=2018|title=Assessment of black crowned crane and wattled crane population and spatiotemporal distribution in Jimma Zone, Southwest Ethiopia|journal=Global Ecology and Conservation|volume=16|article-number=e00459|doi=10.1016/j.gecco.2018.e00459|doi-access=free|bibcode=2018GEcoC..1600459A }} It is also known to roost in trees. Its range extends from the Senegal Basin and Guinea-Bissau Drainage in West Africa to the Ethiopian Highlands and South-West Rift Valley in East Africa. Balearica pavonina pavonina occupies the western part of this range, while Balearica pavonina ceciliae is found in the east with the greatest numbers in Sudan

relations.subject: 黑冕鶴
relations.evidence: Currently, the black crowned crane is listed as a Vulnerable species on the IUCN Red List, with a population of 28 000–47 000 individuals remaining. Black crowned cranes face major conservation threats due to the degradation of wetlands which act as the principal breeding, feeding and roosting sites for the species. Increases in drought and the draining of wetlands in the name of farming, dam construction or irrigation projects have led to the destruction of these ecosystems. Furthermore, fragmented wetlands result in reduced movement of aquatic mammals and therefore limits Black crowned crane food availability
relations.object_summary: 底栖生物和小型鱼类下降带来的觅食压力。
